proposal_text:
Title: Strange Bloom
Concept: The apocalypse was just the start. Embrace your strange new evolution.
Website Product Description: Step into a world reborn, where the familiar has given way to the magnificent. *Strange Bloom* invites you to go beyond mere survival in a post-apocalyptic future; it challenges you to embrace a truly unique and unexpected new beginning. The Earth has been transformed, fostering a peculiar rebirth where humanity and the natural world have begun to beautifully converge. As a player, you'll embark on an incredible journey of discovery, unlocking extraordinary new forms and abilities that reflect your symbiotic evolution with this vibrant, wild new planet. Explore breathtaking landscapes, uncover the secrets of this thriving yet enigmatic ecosystem, and redefine what it means to be human. This is not just a game; it's an adventure into a future where your very essence can bloom into something truly novel, powerful, and utterly your own. Are you ready to discover the strange, wonderful 'new self' that awaits?

Title: Perceptual Glitch
Concept: Your mind is the battlefield. Reality is the illusion.
Website Product Description: Step into Perceptual Glitch, a groundbreaking horror experience where your mind becomes your gravest enemy. What if the world around you started to subtly betray your senses? In this innovative psychological thriller, reality itself begins to fray, not with cheap jump scares, but with insidious 'subtle inconsistencies' that burrow into your very perception. You'll navigate environments that shift without warning, encounter sounds that whisper doubt, and question memories you thought were solid. This isn't just a game; it's a descent into a deeply personal nightmare, fueled by a 'psychological venom' that twists the familiar into something terrifyingly alien. Every shadow might hide an illusion, every truth a lie, making you constantly second-guess what's real. Perceptual Glitch offers an unsettling, cutting-edge horror that challenges your sanity, making you feel truly vulnerable and creating an unforgettable experience where the greatest terror lies within your own mind. Can you trust your eyes, your ears, or even your thoughts, when reality itself is under attack?
